allow: Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const d=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); d.workflow_runs.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.status, r.conclusion, r.created_at, r.name\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const d=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); const r=d.workflow_runs[0]; console.log\('status:', r.status, '| conclusion:', r.conclusion, '| commit:', r.head_sha.slice\(0,7\), '| updated:', r.updated_at\); }\)")
